description_long: This is a round, golden-brown loaf of bread with a domed top and a visually striking, pleated crust pattern that radiates from the center. The crust is glossy and appears to have been brushed with egg wash, giving it a slightly shiny finish. The loaf sits on a circular, rustic-looking base, possibly a thin wooden or cardboard board. The bread's surface features deep, curved ridges and folds, suggesting a soft, fluffy interior beneath the well-baked exterior. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or branding on the surface. The overall appearance is artisanal, with a hand-shaped, home-baked quality.
description: A round, golden-brown loaf of bread with a glossy, pleated crust and a domed, fluffy appearance. The surface features deep, curved ridges and a shiny finish.
description_view_0: The loaf is seen from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting the domed top and the radiating pleats of the crust, with the glossy finish most visible.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the side of the bread, showing the depth of the pleats and the even browning of the crust around the circumference.
description_view_2: The loaf appears more upright, with the pleats and folds clearly visible and the base of the bread sitting flat on the circular board.
description_view_3: The pleated pattern is prominent, and the loaf's rounded shape and even coloration are clearly displayed from this angle.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features a pleated, radiating pattern with deep, curved ridges that create a visually striking, artisanal appearance. The surface is glossy and evenly browned, with no seeds or flour dusting.
